item.name: Horse Chestnut Ring Coffer (IL 515)
item.description:
A wooden chest containing a ring. Traditionally, boxes for rings are far smaller, though this one was clearly not intended to be used in a marriage proposal.

Required level: 80. IL: 515. Ring type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
